## Overview

<!-- Maintainers: Fill this in when creating a good-first-issue ticket. -->

A clear, one-paragraph description of the task.

## Why This Matters

Explain how this task helps Kairo Phantom's mission of being reliable,
installable, and trustworthy for every user on every platform.

## What You Need to Know

- **Language:** Rust / Python / Both
- **Estimated effort:** < 2 hours
- **Requires running the app:** Yes / No
- **Relevant files:**
  - `phantom-core/src/<file>.rs`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] All existing tests still pass (`cargo test`)
- [ ] A new unit test covers the change

## How to Get Started

1. Fork the repo and clone it locally
2. Run `cargo test` to confirm the baseline passes
3. Make your change in the relevant file
4. Run `cargo test` again
5. Open a PR with the title: `fix: <short description>`

## Need Help?

Tag `@Kartik24Hulmukh` in your PR or drop a comment here. We respond within 24 hours.
